creator: info@babaei.net
text:
Created attachment 151680
A picture to show what's missing.

After updating ports on my system at work last week I noticed that all the icons and pictures for Workrave on the buttons or the animated pictures in exercise mode are gone. It happens in XFCE tray area and also on the status window.

While ago it happened with gedit and Firefox but rebuilding them from ports did the trick. Today I did an upgraded on my system at home and the same problem happened again. I'm using 10.1-STABLE on both systems.

In my estimation the culprit is png port. Because /usr/ports/UPDATING mentions and update to png on this date 2014/12/25 which Workrave relies on. I did reinstall Workrave without any luck.

I'll attach a sample picture to this bug report.
